The '''Coronet Mining Corporation''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] owned by [[Janqual Mor]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This corporation is mentioned in a mission called "Gang War Threatens Mining Interests" in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', available at Mission Terminals on Corellia.
